CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100));
SET SESSION AUTHORIZATION role_admin; SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name LIKE 'Test%');
SET SESSION AUTHORIZATION role_user; SELECT count(*) FROM test_table;
SET SESSION AUTHORIZATION role_admin; INSERT INTO test_table SELECT id + 2, CONCAT(name, ' Updated') FROM test_table WHERE id < 3;
SET SESSION AUTHORIZATION role_user; UPDATE test_table SET name = CONCAT(name, ' Modified') WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_table);
SET SESSION AUTHORIZATION role_admin; DELETE FROM test_table WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name = 'Test User 1');
SET SESSION AUTHORIZATION role_user; SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, name FROM test_table) AS subquery WHERE id > 1;
CREATE TABLE test_table_2 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, description VARCHAR(200));
SET SESSION AUTHORIZATION role_admin; SELECT a.id, a.name, b.description FROM test_table a JOIN test_table_2 b ON a.id = b.id;
SET SESSION AUTHORIZATION role_user; SELECT id, name FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table_2 WHERE description LIKE '%1%');
